## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes locally (or relevant subset documented below)
- [ ] Added a regression test that fails without this change
- [ ] No new hardcoded secrets / wildcards / credentials
- [ ] Updated `ARCHITECTURE.md` if module boundaries changed
- [ ] Added an ADR entry to `DECISIONS.md` if this is an architectural decision
- [ ] Updated `MISTAKES.md` if I introduced or discovered a gotcha
- [ ] Frontend changes have screenshots / loom in the PR description
